description.en: Sent to theRTCIceTransportwhen a new, better pair of candidates has been selected to describe the connectivity between the two peers. This occurs during negotiation or renegotiation, including after an ICE restart, which reuses the existingRTCIceTransportobjects. The current candidate pair can be obtained usinggetSelectedCandidatePair(). Also available using theonselectedcandidatepairchangeevent handler property.
